game.tetris.controls: [←]/[→] Move Left/Right [Z] Rotate Left [X] Rotate Right [↓] Soft Drop [Space] Hard Drop [P] Restart at Specific Level [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.tetris.description: Move and rotate falling blocks to arrange them neatly, filling complete lines to clear them and score.
game.tetris.details:
f%Classic NES version of Tetris. Clear lines to get a high score.

{tc:yellow}Game Mechanics:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Level Progression:{tc:clear} Higher LV increases the falling speed, max speed at LV29.

{tc:yellow}Stages:{tc:clear}
{tc:white}Classic{tc:clear} LV0-LV28 before first cycle. Normal game.
{tc:red}Challenge{tc:clear} LV29+. Maximum falling speed.
{tc:rgb(232,158,36)}Dusk{tc:clear} LV146. Block colors blend into background, harder to see.
{tc:gray}Darkness{tc:clear} LV148. Block colors blend even more, extremely hard to see.
{tc:yellow}Crash Point{tc:clear} LV155-LV157. Special stage name, no special mechanic.
{tc:green}Marathon{tc:clear} LV235. Requires clearing 810 lines to advance.
{tc:light_red}Dawn{tc:clear} LV255. Approaching the cycle point.
{tc:light_cyan}Rebirth{tc:clear} Cycled LV0-LV28. Game restarts from level 0, score persists.

{tc:yellow}Press P to restart at a specific level:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}LV:{tc:clear}0-28

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move left/right
{tc:light_cyan}[Z]{tc:clear} Rotate left
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Rotate right
{tc:light_cyan}[↓]{tc:clear} Soft drop
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Hard drop
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Restart at specific level
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.tetris.name: Tetris
